[80.240737, 12.921607],
[80.240753, 12.921649]

        ],
      },
      properties: { routeId: 19 }
    },
  ]
};


const colors = {
  1: '#708090',
  2: '#708090',
  3: '#708090',
  4: '#708090',
  5: '#708090',
  6: '#708090',
  7: '#708090',
  8: '#708090',
  9: '#708090',
  10: '#708090',
  11: '#708090',
  12: '#708090',
  13: '#708090',
  14: '#708090',
  15: '#708090',
  16: '#708090',
  17: '#708090',
  18: '#708090',
  19: '#708090',
};




const busMarkersGeoJSON = {
  type: 'FeatureCollection',
  features: routesGeoJSON.features.map(route => ({
    type: 'Feature',
    geometry: {
      type: 'Point',
       coordinates: routesGeoJSON.features[0].geometry.coordinates[0]
    },
    properties: {
      routeId: route.properties.routeId
    }
  }))
};



const lineLayers = Object.entries(colors).map(([id, color]) => ({
  id: `route-layer-${id}`,
  type: 'line',
  paint: {
    'line-color': color,
    'line-width': 4,
  },
  filter: ['==', ['get', 'routeId'], Number(id)]
}));

export default function App() {

 
const mapRef = useRef<MapRef | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const map = mapRef.current?.getMap();
    if (!map) return;

    const image = new Image(100, 100); // Adjust size if needed
    image.src = busIcon;
    image.onload = () => {
      if (!map.hasImage('bus-icon')) {
        map.addImage('bus-icon', image);
      }
    };
  }, []);


  return (
    <Map



      initialViewState={{
        longitude: 80.224,
        latitude: 13.030,
        zoom: 15,
      }}
      mapStyle="https://tiles.openfreemap.org/styles/bright"
    >
      <Source id="routesSource" type="geojson" data={routesGeoJSON}>
        {lineLayers.map(layer => (
          <Layer key={layer.id} {...layer} />
        ))}
      </Source>


 {/* Bus icon markers at start of each route */}
      <Source id="busMarkersSource" type="geojson" data={busMarkersGeoJSON}>
        <Layer
          id="bus-marker-layer"
          type="symbol"
          layout={{
            'icon-image': 'bus-icon',
            'icon-size': 0.08,
            'icon-allow-overlap': true
          }}
        />
      </Source>
      

    </Map>
  );
}
